testcase.name: test_create_student_creates_audit_entry
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_audit.py:81: in test_create_student_creates_audit_entry assert create_res.status_code in [200, 201], f"Student creation failed: {create_res.text}" E AssertionError: Student creation failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","year_level"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"first_name":"TEST_AuditFirst","last_name":"TEST_AuditLast","grade":"5","school":"Test School","date_of_birth":"2015-01-01"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","class_name"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"first_name":"TEST_AuditFirst","last_name":"TEST_AuditLast","grade":"5","school":"Test School","date_of_birth":"2015-01-01"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 in [200, 201] E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
